sources.title: Automated Meta Prompt Engineering for Alignment with the Theory of Mind
sources.summary: Meta-prompting with agentic RL: LLM Judge teaches via in-context learning for ToM alignment. Hilbert vector space for content traits. Deployed US Open 2024.

sources.title: Meta Prompting for AI Systems
sources.summary: Functor/monad framework for recursive meta-prompting. Strong on compositional reasoning/math.

sources.title: On Meta-Prompting
sources.summary: Category theory for ICL/meta-prompting. Guarantees compositional strategies.

sources.title: prompttools: LLM + Vector DB Tools
sources.summary: Open-source for prompt testing with Chroma/Weaviate/LanceDB.

sources.title: HAKES: Scalable Vector Database
sources.summary: Two-stage ANN index, disaggregated for high throughput.
